plugin_desc: Lantech industrial managed Ethernet switch SNMP baseline child template for devices under Lantech PEN 148305. This child template relies on the shared Switch SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Current public facts confirm the enterprise root, industrial switch product surface and official SNMP/MIB capability statements, but do not prove stable shared CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power-health leaf OIDs, so private switch-management objects are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: Switch
